compiled_state.title: RED test: Modify test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh to assert CLI_user tag extraction before fix-bug inline
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## TDD Requirement (RED phase — modify-existing-test)

Modify `tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh` to add a new test function asserting that debug-everything SKILL.md bug-fix mode documents extracting tags from ticket show output before inlining fix-bug.

Add a new function `test_bug_fix_mode_extracts_cli_user_tag()` that:
1. Reads `plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md`
2. Asserts that the bug-fix mode section contains guidance to extract tags from `ticket show` output before inlining fix-bug steps
3. Asserts that the guidance explicitly mentions the CLI_user tag check

The test must FAIL (RED) before the debug-everything SKILL.md update because the current text has no CLI_user tag extraction guidance in bug-fix mode.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `test_bug_fix_mode_extracts_cli_user_tag` function added to test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh
  Verify: grep -q "test_bug_fix_mode_extracts_cli_user_tag" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh
- [ ] New test function currently fails RED against unmodified SKILL.md
  Verify: Confirmed by inspection — current SKILL.md bug-fix mode has no CLI_user extraction guidance
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` suite does not crash (new test failure is expected, suite continues)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -5
- [ ] Note: test file is already in .test-index for debug-everything/SKILL.md — no new entry needed
  Verify: grep -q "test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6 ✓ — test_bug_fix_mode_extracts_cli_user_tag added and confirmed failing (RED)
comments.author: Test
